wizard.previewEmpty: Fill in the form to see a preview
wizard.subtitleEdit: Update the details of your activity.
wizard.subtitleNew: Fill in the details to publish your activity on kidvo.
wizard.beforeSub: Please read the following before creating your listing on kidvo.

rules.title: Trial sessions are on by default
rules.desc: Every listing should offer a trial session. If your activity has a genuine reason it can't (cohort schedule, full capacity), you can explain this — parents will see your reason.

rules.title: Direct relationship with parents
rules.desc: kidvo connects you with parents, but all contracts, payments, and agreements happen directly between you and the family. kidvo is not involved in any financial transactions.

rules.title: You are responsible for compliance
rules.desc: You must hold all required licenses, certifications, and insurance for your activity. kidvo does not verify credentials and is not liable for any incidents.

rules.title: Listings are reviewed before going live
rules.desc: Every new listing is reviewed by the kidvo team within 24 hours. Listings that do not meet our quality standards may be rejected.

wizard.agreeText: I have read and agree to the above rules and kidvo's
wizard.addressHint: Street address where the activity takes place
wizard.mapsHint: Paste the Google Maps share link so parents can find you easily
wizard.scheduleHint: Pick the days that share the same start/end time, then click "Add for selected days". Repeat for different time slots.
wizard.noSchedulesYet: No time slots added yet. Pick days above and click "Add for selected days".
wizard.coverHint: Square or landscape photo works best. It will be displayed on your activity card.
wizard.photoFormats: JPG, PNG or WebP · max 5 MB
wizard.spotsTotalHint: Maximum kids the group can hold
wizard.spotsAvailableHint: How many spots are open right now
wizard.spotsInvalid: Available spots can't be greater than the total capacity.
wizard.aboutHint: Tell parents what makes your activity special
wizard.includesHint: e.g. UEFA-licensed coaches, free trial session
wizard.trialOn: Parents can book a free first session
wizard.trialOff: Parents will see a reason instead of a booking button

feedback.placeholder: What feature or section is missing? What would help you most?
feedback.googleNudge: If you're enjoying kidvo, a Google review would mean a lot:

privacySections.whoWeAreBody: kidvo (kidvo.eu) is a discovery platform connecting parents with local activity providers in Timișoara, Romania. Contact: hello@kidvo.eu
privacySections.parentsBody: Email, full name, children's names and birth years, neighborhood, saved activities, trial requests.
privacySections.providersBody: Email, display name, business description, contact phone, contact email, listings and schedules.
privacySections.whyWeCollectBody: To operate the kidvo platform, facilitate trial requests, send transactional emails, and improve the product. Legal basis: contract performance and legitimate interests (GDPR Art. 6).
privacySections.cookiesBody: kidvo uses essential cookies for authentication (Supabase Auth) and analytics cookies (Google Analytics 4: _ga, _ga_*) to understand how visitors use the platform. Data is anonymised and aggregated. No advertising or remarketing cookies.
privacySections.dataSharingBody: We share data only with Supabase (database/auth), Resend (email), Vercel (hosting), and Google Analytics (anonymised usage analytics). When a trial is confirmed, your contact details are shared with the relevant provider. We do not sell your data.
privacySections.yourRightsBody: You have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your data. Email hello@kidvo.eu and we'll respond within 30 days.
privacySections.retentionBody: Data is retained while your account is active. On account deletion, personal data is removed within 30 days.
privacySections.childrenDataIntro: kidvo does not collect data from children — it collects data about children, entered by parents or legal guardians. This is an important distinction.
privacySections.childrenDataCollectedBody: The child's name, birth year, and interests (activity categories).
privacySections.childrenDataWhoBody: Data about children is entered solely by the parent or legal guardian. We rely on their confirmation that they have the right to provide this data.
privacySections.childrenDataUseBody: Solely to match the child with relevant activities. Shared with the provider only when a trial request is made (name + age only — no more than necessary). Never used for advertising or profiling.
privacySections.childrenDataAccessBody: The parent who entered it, the provider receiving the trial request, and the kidvo team.
privacySections.childrenDataRetentionBody: Data is kept while the account is active. Parents can request deletion at any time at
privacySections.childrenDataNoAccounts: kidvo does not allow children to create accounts. All accounts are for parents/guardians aged 18 and over.

termsSections.whatKidvoIsBody1: kidvo is a discovery and connection platform.
termsSections.whatKidvoIsBody2: All agreements, contracts, and payments are made directly between parents and providers. kidvo takes no responsibility for the quality, safety, or conduct of any activity or provider.
termsSections.providerResponsibilitiesBody: Providers must provide accurate information, hold all required licenses and insurance, offer trial sessions by default (and provide a clear reason if unavailable), and respond to trial requests in a timely manner. kidvo may remove listings that violate these terms.
termsSections.trialSessionsBody: Trial requests are expressions of interest only — not bookings or contracts. Any arrangement following a trial request is solely between the parent and provider.
termsSections.paymentsBody: kidvo does not process or handle any payments. All financial transactions occur directly between parents and providers.
termsSections.liabilityBody: kidvo provides the platform "as is" and is not liable for damages arising from use of the platform or the conduct of providers. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid to kidvo in the preceding 12 months.
termsSections.acceptableUseBody: You agree not to use kidvo for unlawful purposes, post false information, attempt unauthorized access, or scrape content without permission.
termsSections.governingLawBody: These terms are governed by Romanian law. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Timișoara, Romania.
